description_long: This is an L-shaped kitchen cabinetry unit featuring a combination of base and tall pantry cabinets, integrated appliances, and open shelving. The cabinetry is finished in a light wood veneer with subtle grain patterns, giving it a modern and clean appearance. The base section includes a built-in cooktop and sink, with drawers and doors for storage beneath the countertop. The tall section houses an oven and microwave, as well as additional storage compartments above and below. Open shelves are present at the ends of both the base and tall sections, providing accessible display or storage space. The handles are sleek bar pulls, and the overall design is functional and space-efficient, suitable for urban kitchens or communal spaces.
description: L-shaped kitchen cabinetry with light wood finish, integrated appliances, and open shelving. Features bar pull handles and a modern, functional design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full L-shape layout, integrated cooktop and sink, and the arrangement of drawers and cabinets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall pantry section with built-in oven and microwave, as well as open shelving at the end.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the cooktop, sink, and the main access points for drawers and cabinets.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the tall cabinet section, open shelves, and upper storage compartments.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen base and tall pantry cabinet
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door, single door, drawers, and open shelf
